ZCode Flatpak

Unofficial Flatpak packaging of ZCode (the GLM-5.2 harness from Z.ai), published as a self-hosted Flatpak repository.

Install

flatpak remote-add --user --no-gpg-verify zcode \
    https://sliced-paraiba.github.io/zcode-flatpak/repo
flatpak install --user zcode ai.zcode.ZCode

Then launch ZCode from your app menu, or:

flatpak run ai.zcode.ZCode

Update

flatpak update ai.zcode.ZCode

This repository rebuilds automatically when upstream publishes a new ZCode release.

This is an unofficial packaging. ZCode is © Z.ai.
